componentInventory.name: SiteHeader
componentInventory.purpose: Sticky top nav with logo, dropdown menus, and always-visible call + verify-insurance CTAs.

componentInventory.name: MegaMenu
componentInventory.purpose: Dropdown for Programs / What We Treat / About showing child links.

componentInventory.name: MobileNavDrawer
componentInventory.purpose: Slide-in accordion navigation for small screens.

componentInventory.name: StickyCallBar
componentInventory.purpose: Mobile bottom bar pinning Call Now and Verify Insurance actions.

componentInventory.name: SiteFooter
componentInventory.purpose: Multi-column link footer with NAP, accreditations, and legal links.

componentInventory.name: Hero
componentInventory.purpose: Page hero with headline, subcopy, primary CTAs, and background/imagery.

componentInventory.name: FeatureGrid
componentInventory.purpose: Renders 'features' sections as icon + heading + text cards.

componentInventory.name: CardGrid
componentInventory.purpose: Renders 'cards' sections (program/service/level-of-care cards with links).

componentInventory.name: StepList
componentInventory.purpose: Numbered process/steps section (e.g., admissions or treatment flow).

componentInventory.name: ProseBlock
componentInventory.purpose: Rich long-form 'prose' content with typographic rhythm.

componentInventory.name: TestimonialCarousel
componentInventory.purpose: Rotating patient/family testimonials.

componentInventory.purpose: Logos of accepted insurers plus a verify-insurance CTA.

componentInventory.name: FaqAccordion
componentInventory.purpose: Expandable FAQ section with schema.org FAQ markup.

componentInventory.name: HubList

componentInventory.name: TeamBio

componentInventory.name: Gallery

componentInventory.name: ContactSection

componentInventory.name: CtaBanner
componentInventory.purpose: Full-width conversion band with phone + verify insurance.

componentInventory.name: Breadcrumbs

componentInventory.name: AccreditationBadges

componentInventory.name: BlogCard
componentInventory.purpose: Article preview card for the blog index.

buildBrief: Build a fast, accessible Next.js (App Router) site on a fluid 12-column grid with a max content width around 1200px and generous whitespace driven by an 8px spacing scale (8/16/24/40/64/96). Lead with the forest-green primary (#2D5A3D) for headers, primary buttons, and section anchors; use sage (#7D9B76) for supporting surfaces and the gold accent (#A77C43) sparingly for CTAs, badges, and links so conversion actions always pop. Type sets Fraunces for expressive headings against Inter body copy, keeping line length 60-75 characters and a clear modular scale for calm, editorial hierarchy. Imagery should feel warm and human: soft rounded corners (12-16px), subtle shadows, muted duotone or natural-light treatments of the facility and Iowa landscape, all served as responsive next/image with AVIF/WebP and blur placeholders. Conversion is the priority on every template: a persistent header phone link and Verify Insurance button, a mobile sticky call bar, and CtaBanner + InsuranceStrip repeated at natural scroll depths. Establish reusable section primitives (Hero, FeatureGrid, CardGrid, StepList, FaqAccordion, HubList, TeamBio) so all 31 pages compose from a shared design system with consistent rhythm. Meet WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1 contrast, visible focus states, semantic landmarks, keyboard-navigable menus, reduced-motion support) throughout. Target Lighthouse 95+ across Performance/Accessibility/Best-Practices/SEO by shipping mostly static server components, minimal client JS, font-display swap, and preloaded critical assets. Preserve all legacy URL slugs and reach SEO parity or better with per-page metadata, canonical tags, XML sitemap, and JSON-LD for LocalBusiness/MedicalOrganization, BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage.
warnings: areas-we-serve/west-des-moines has copied SEO title and description from the Ankeny page ('Minutes From Ankeny IA') - needs unique West Des Moines metadata.
what-we-treat/fentanyl-rehab-des-moines has copied SEO title and description from the Benzo page - needs unique fentanyl metadata.
programs/des-moines-outpatient-rehab shares its SEO title ('Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP)...') and description with programs/php-des-moines - duplicate/mismatched metadata to disambiguate.
Team slug 'team/welsey-starlin' misspells 'Wesley'; hero and title read 'Wesley Starlin'. Slug preserved for SEO but flag for a 301 redirect to a corrected slug if desired.
What We Treat hub CTAs link to non-existent 'Marijuana Rehab' and 'Stimulants Rehab' pages and omit the existing Cocaine and Drug rehab pages - align hub links with the 7 real condition pages.
No index/landing pages exist for /team or /areas-we-serve; nav 'Our Team' points to /about#team and 'Areas We Serve' parent points to a child page. Consider adding real index routes.
brand.json notes a stale JSON-LD phone (888) 775-4566 that must be ignored; standardize all structured data and tel: links on 888-378-2158.
Brand name is misspelled 'Des Moins Wellness Center' in some source content and the working directory - ensure 'Des Moines' everywhere in copy and metadata.
SEO titles are very long with a repeated '| Des Moines Wellness Center | Alcohol & Drug Rehab Iowa' suffix (often >60 chars); trim to reduce SERP truncation.
programs/php-des-moines lists a 'contact' section twice (mid-page and end) - dedupe when composing the template.
Domain mismatch to confirm: brand domain and email use desmoinesrecovery.com while the brand name is 'Des Moines Wellness Center' - verify canonical https://desmoinesrecovery.com is correct.
